results.title: Zelensky confirms strike on oil facility in Russia’s Yaroslavl region and Azot plant
results.description: President Volodymyr Zelensky confirmed that the troops of the Security Service of Ukraine struck an oil facility in Russia’s Yaroslavl region, 700 kilometers from the Ukrainian border, and that the Defense Forces struck the Azot plant in Russia’s Tula region.

results.title: Ha Jung-woo Returns to Gupo Market, May Take District Chair Post
results.description: Ha Jung-woo, former presidential AI secretary who lost the Busan Buk-A by-election to Han Dong-hoon by 1.7 points, returns to Gupo Market amid speculation he may take the district chair post.

results.title: Swiss reject population cap in referendum, avoiding EU clash
results.description: Swiss vote, likened to Brexit, raised fears over ending free labour movement with the EU partner
